about.title: About Buurtinzicht
about.subtitle: We help people find their ideal neighborhood by turning complex data into understandable insights and personalized recommendations.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Finding the perfect neighborhood to live in is one of the most important decisions in a person's life. Yet, it is often difficult to find objective information that matches your personal needs and preferences.
mission.paragraph2: That's why we developed Buurtinzicht: a platform that combines comprehensive data about Belgian neighborhoods with your personal preferences to find the best match.

unique.title: What makes us unique?
unique.item1: Personalized scorecards based on your preferences
unique.item2: Real-time data from reliable government and commercial sources
unique.item3: Interactive maps with detailed neighborhood information

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These core values guide everything we do, from product design to customer service.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: We provide accurate and reliable data to help you make informed decisions.

userFocused.title: User-Focused
userFocused.description: Your needs are central. We build tools that truly help in finding your ideal home.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We use the latest technologies to turn complex data into understandable insights.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Openness about our methodology and data sources, so you can trust our analyses.

docs.title: API Documentation
docs.subtitle: Learn how to use the Buurtinzicht API to retrieve spatial data and neighborhood information

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: All API requests require a valid API key in the request header.

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.description: The API has a rate limit of 1000 requests per hour per API key.

note.title: Note
note.content: When you reach the rate limit, you will receive a 429 status code. The headers contain information about when you can make requests again.

errorHandling.title: Error Handling
errorHandling.description: The API uses standard HTTP status codes and returns structured error responses.

whatIs.question: What is Buurtinzicht?
whatIs.answer: Buurtinzicht is a platform that helps you find the ideal neighborhood to live in Belgium. We combine official data with your personal preferences to provide personalized recommendations.

howItWorks.question: How does the neighborhood matching work?
howItWorks.answer: You indicate what is important to you (safety, transport, culture, etc.) and we calculate scores for all neighborhoods based on your preferences. This way you can find neighborhoods that best suit your lifestyle.

coverage.question: Which areas do you cover?
coverage.answer: We cover all of Belgium with detailed data for more than 11,000 neighborhoods and districts. From large cities to small villages - all municipalities are included in our database.

accuracy.question: How accurate is your data?
accuracy.answer: Our data comes from reliable sources such as Statbel, FPS Interior, MIVB/De Lijn/TEC and other official bodies. We update the information regularly to ensure accuracy.

updates.question: How often is the data updated?
updates.answer: Basic demographic data is updated annually. Information on transport, crime and amenities is updated monthly. Price data is updated weekly.

contribute.question: Can I add or correct data myself?
contribute.answer: Currently, users cannot change data directly. However, you can report errors or make suggestions via our contact form. We check all reports and adjust the data if necessary.

preferences.question: Can I adjust my preferences?
preferences.answer: Yes, you can always change your preferences in your account settings. Your scorecards are automatically recalculated based on your new preferences.

scorecard.question: What is a scorecard?
scorecard.answer: A scorecard is a personalized report that shows how well a neighborhood suits you. It contains scores for different categories and compares the neighborhood with your ideal profile.

compare.question: Can I compare neighborhoods?
compare.answer: Yes, you can compare up to 4 neighborhoods at the same time. This helps you make an informed choice between different options.

share.question: Can multiple people share an account?
share.answer: An account is intended for individual use. For families, we recommend setting the preferences together or creating your own account.

cost.question: What does Buurtinzicht cost?
cost.answer: We have a free plan with basic features and paid plans from €19/month. Check out our pricing page for a full overview of features per plan.

trial.question: Is there a free trial period?
trial.answer: The free plan already gives you access to the core features. For paid plans, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee if you are not satisfied.

cancel.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. There are no long-term contracts. You will retain access to paid features until the end of your billing period.

payment.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), SEPA transfers and PayPal. All payments are processed securely.

mobile.question: Is there a mobile app?
mobile.answer: We currently do not have a native app, but our website is fully optimized for mobile use and works great on smartphones and tablets.

browsers.question: Does Buurtinzicht work on all browsers?
browsers.answer: Yes, we support all modern browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge. For the best experience, we recommend keeping your browser up-to-date.

api.question: Is there an API available?
api.answer: Yes, we offer a REST API for business users. Contact us for more information about API access and pricing.

q1.question: Can I change my plan at any time?
q1.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and you will be billed pro-rata.

q2.question: Is there a free trial period?
q2.answer: The free plan already gives you access to the core features. For paid plans, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee.

q3.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: We accept all major credit cards, SEPA transfer and PayPal for a secure and easy payment experience.

q4.question: Is my data safe?
q4.answer: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade security and comply with all GDPR guidelines to protect your data.
